tier_1.title: Quicksand Pit
tier_1.description: The ground looks solid. It isn't. Someone is already waist-deep before anyone reacts.
tier_1.success: You spot the discolored earth and redirect the party around it.
tier_1.failure: Three people sink before ropes and branches pull them out. Half a day lost.

tier_1.title: Biting Insect Cloud
tier_1.description: A black cloud of insects descends without warning. Every exposed surface is covered instantly.
tier_1.success: You recall that smoke drives them off. A smudge fire and the cloud disperses.
tier_1.failure: The swarm is relentless. The party suffers welts and exhaustion.

tier_1.title: Fruit Grove
tier_1.description: Broad-leafed trees hang heavy with unfamiliar fruit.
tier_1.success: Edible and sweet. You fill packs with enough to last two days.
tier_1.failure: Some are edible. Some are not. You can't tell which.

tier_2.title: Overgrown Temple Ruins
tier_2.description: Stone walls emerge from the undergrowth, covered in moss and carved faces. Something glints in a crevice.
tier_2.success: You find a cache of preserved offerings — useful supplies and a hand-drawn map fragment.
tier_2.failure: The ruins are trapped. You escape but gain nothing.

tier_2.title: Giant Constrictor
tier_2.description: The branch you grab grabs back.
tier_2.success: You spot the scale pattern before it drops. Wide berth, no fight.
tier_2.failure: It coils around the last person in the column.

tier_3.title: Dinosaur Encounter
tier_3.description: The trees part. A creature the size of a barn regards you with one enormous eye.
tier_3.success: You freeze and wait. It loses interest in you for easier prey.
tier_3.failure: It charges. The jungle offers nowhere to run.

tier_3.title: Canopy Collapse
tier_3.description: A dead tree shatters at the crown and brings a hundred feet of canopy down across the path.
tier_3.success: You clear enough of the debris in an hour to push through.
tier_3.failure: The tangle is impassable. A long detour costs a full day.

tier_4.title: Yuan-ti Ambush
tier_4.description: The jungle goes silent. Then arrows fall from every direction. Scaled figures drop from the canopy on silk lines. This was planned.
tier_4.success: You spot the ambush signs — too-quiet birds, disturbed vines — and set a counter-ambush.
tier_4.failure: The first volley lands before you even know they're there.
tier_4.notes: This is a multi-phase encounter. On success, the party gains the ambush turn. Expect a second wave after the first is broken.
